station_address: Ghatkopar - Mahul Rd, near Shoppers Stop, Chembur West, Tilak Nagar, Kurla, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400089
text:
Saravanan Ganeshan visited Ravi Petrol Pump near Pestom Sagar Road No. 4 on 10/10/2025 at 11:00 PM to refuel my vehicle.

Despite reaching before closing time, your staff stopped the petrol supply at 11:30 PM and refused to provide petrol, claiming that the closing time was 11:00 PM, whereas the actual closing time is 12:00 AM. There was no visible notice about any timing change.

The employees present — Aman, Shrikant, Vikas, and Lalji Sharma — behaved rudely and unprofessionally with the public. Such behaviour is unacceptable and caused serious inconvenience to customers waiting since 11:00 PM.

We have recorded this complaint in the petrol pump logbook, and I have attached a JPEG copy of the same for your reference.

Kindly take strict action against the responsible staff to prevent such incidents in the future.

text: I have been visiting this petrol pump since the day I got my vehicle, and my experience has always been excellent. After the Ghatkopar highway petrol pump incident, there is usually a bit of rush here, so you might have to wait around 10 minutes to refuel. Still, it remains one of the best petrol pumps in terms of service near Ghatkopar
